questionHtml:
What is the molecular formula of a compound with an empirical formula of CHO2 and a relative molecular mass of 90?

A.  CHO2

B.  C2H2O4

C.  C3H6O3

D.  C4H10O2

meta.title: What is the molecular formula of a compound with an empirical formula of CHO2 and a relative molecular mass of 90? A. CHO2 B. C2H2O4 C. C3H6O3 D. C4H10O2
